title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE PINAMALAYAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PINAMALAYAN, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, TO JUAN MORENTE, SR. MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1971 / 50 OG No. 7, 2936 (July, 1954)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1045, June 12, 1954 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE PINAMALAYAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PINAMALAYAN, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, TO JUAN MORENTE, SR. MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Pinamalayan Elementary School in the municipality of Pinamalayan, Province of Oriental Mindoro, is changed to Juan Morente, Sr. Memorial School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 12, 1954.
